ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City of the team */,
  "team_nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "game_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
